questionHtml:
Four identical lamps are connected in a circuit. The current through lamp L is I.

The lamps are rearranged using the same cell.

What is the current through L?


A.  I4

B.  I2

C.  I

D.  2I

meta.title: Four identical lamps are connected in a circuit. The current through lamp L is I. The lamps are rearranged using the same cell. What is the current through L? A. I4 B. I2 C. I D. 2
